rationale: The system shall provide a baseline configuration that can be extended with longer arms, higher lift capacity, or waterproofing as required by a project.
comments: Type: functional | Priority: preferred | Source: Turn 13 (participant) | FRET confidence: high
fulltext: the system shall always satisfy extensible_baseline_configuration

rationale: The system shall enter safe mode when a movement command exceeds the programmed capabilities or the internal processing speed.
comments: Type: functional | Priority: preferred | Source: Turn 15 (participant) | FRET confidence: high
fulltext: when movement_command_exceeds_capabilities_or_speed the system shall immediately enter safe_mode

rationale: The system shall display the range of each joint on the MMI screens and change the display colour when a joint approaches its limits.
comments: Type: functional | Priority: preferred | Source: Turn 19 (participant) | FRET confidence: medium
fulltext: the system shall always satisfy joint_range_display and when joint_approaches_limit shall immediately satisfy joint_limit_warning_displayed

rationale: The system shall provide stops or guides to ensure the cable remains within the designated area.
comments: Type: functional | Priority: preferred | Source: Turn 37 (participant) | FRET confidence: high
fulltext: the system shall always satisfy cable_guidance_stops_engaged

rationale: The system shall allow programming of autonomous point-to-point navigation without manual joystick control.
comments: Type: functional | Priority: preferred | Source: Turn 43 (participant) | FRET confidence: high
fulltext: the system shall always satisfy autonomous_navigation_programming_enabled

rationale: The system shall allow programming the arm to move to a specified position and provide a home button that returns the arm to a predefined state.
comments: Type: functional | Priority: preferred | Source: Turn 45 (participant) | FRET confidence: medium
fulltext: the system shall always satisfy arm_position_programming_enabled

rationale: The system shall move autonomously to a position near the task and then transfer control to the operator.
comments: Type: functional | Priority: preferred | Source: Turn 46 (participant) | FRET confidence: medium

rationale: The system shall provide feedback to indicate when an operation is proceeding incorrectly.
comments: Type: functional | Priority: preferred | Source: Turn 50 (participant) | FRET confidence: high
fulltext: when operation_proceeding_incorrectly the system shall immediately satisfy feedback_provided

rationale: The system shall provide a variable viewpoint that allows users to look around to enhance depth perception.
comments: Type: functional | Priority: preferred | Source: Turn 52 (participant) | FRET confidence: high
fulltext: the system shall always satisfy variable_viewpoint_for_depth_perception

rationale: The system shall provide a fixed camera view that can be selected and remain constant.

rationale: The system shall prioritize resolution over frame rate.
comments: Type: non-functional | Priority: preferred | Source: Turn 72 (participant) | FRET confidence: high

rationale: The system shall use force feedback to indicate forward motion and stop movement when forward motion is not detected.
comments: Type: functional | Priority: preferred | Source: Turn 76 (participant) | FRET confidence: medium
fulltext: when forward_motion_detected the system shall always satisfy force_feedback_for_forward_motion

comments: Type: functional | Priority: preferred | Source: Turn 78 (participant) | FRET confidence: high

rationale: The system shall provide an alarm when drifting into a no-go zone.
comments: Type: functional | Priority: preferred | Source: Turn 86 (participant) | FRET confidence: high
fulltext: when drifting_into_no_go_zone the system shall immediately satisfy alarm_activated
